Swarm Coordination Research Group

Coordinator

Prof. Dr. Feza Kerestecioğlu

Project Team

Area of Research

The group’s research aims to develop local strategies for achieving and controlling formations of non-communicating robot swarms. The emphasis is primarily on arc-like and circular formations.
